title: Small Axes
description: makes axes smaller for better visibility
body:
# 🪓 Small Axes
Big axes getting in your way? Small Axes is a minimalist texture pack that reduces the size of all axe models, giving you a clearer view while chopping trees, fighting mobs, or building. Stay efficient and stylish with a cleaner, less intrusive HUD.

✅ Features:
✔️ Smaller axe models for every tier (wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite)

✔️ Faithful to the vanilla Minecraft art style

✔️ Ideal for PvP, survival, or aesthetic gameplay

✔️ Compatible with other resource packs

📦 Compatibility:
Minecraft Java Edition

No mods required

**Part of the small tools series**
